content.en:
Invincible True Ancestors who have reached the top level, it is almost difficult to progress at this point.

For example, the Blood Demon General, who can kill the weaker Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, how terrifying is such a strength, once he steps into the realm of the Dao Ancestor, he will immediately be the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Even in the Divine Heaven Realm, the Invincible True Ancestor was almost at the limit, and it was difficult to break this limit.

For example, Ye Tian himself is now close to the limit.

If his cultivation goes any further, he will reach the limit of the Great Dao, and his body and soul will also be close to the limit, no matter how much he improves, his strength is estimated to be doubled.

But even if the strength is doubled, it still belongs to the level of the invincible true ancestor.

Of course, Ye Tian still has room for improvement.

For example, if he can cultivate a Thousand Dao Technique to the Perfection Realm or even the Extreme Level, then his strength will definitely increase significantly.

In addition, he has not yet comprehended the fur of the supreme sword path, if he comprehends it, or masters half of the supreme sword dao, his strength will also improve rapidly.

"If I make progress in all aspects, I don't know if I can break the limit of the Invincible True Ancestor, and I don't know what level it should be called after breaking it?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Ouyang Jiu'er also ended his cultivation at this time, and his cultivation reached the late stage of the Great Dao, and in terms of aura, he was probably not weaker than the Supreme True Ancestor, and even approached the Invincible True Ancestor.

Of course, Ye Tian still felt that Ouyang Jiu'er was not simple, and perhaps he had already reached the invincible True Ancestor combat power.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian said to Ouyang Jiu'er.

Immediately, Ye Tian took Ouyang Jiu'er out of the Wind King's small realm and returned to the human race.

At this time, Ouyang Jiu'er was still a little pity, she still wanted to cultivate in the Nine Secluded Forbidden Pool for a period of time, in that case, her cultivation might be able to reach the peak realm of the Great Dao.

"Jiu'er, do you know if there is a standard of combat power above the Invincible True Ancestor?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

He felt that if there was really such a standard, then Ouyang Jiu'er, who had been a half-step domain ancestor, must have known it, at least much more than the Blood Demon Generals.

After all, the Bloody Demon General is only an invincible True Ancestor, and he knows too little about it.

"Invincible True Ancestor!" Ouyang Jiu'er was silent for a while, and then asked, "Why are you asking this, could it be that you broke the shackles and became invincible?"

"No, just curious!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, indeed!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "It's just that this difficulty is too great, the limit that countless peerless geniuses can finally reach is just the Invincible True Ancestor! In the Divine Heaven Realm, the Invincible True Ancestor is a standard that is not recognized, but the standard above the Invincible True Ancestor is recognized by all the Dao Ancestors, but few people know about it, because in the entire Divine Heaven Realm, it is possible to give birth to such a genius in a long time." "

"Above the Invincible True Ancestor, it is called the Supreme True Ancestor!"

Supreme True Ancestor!

When Ye Tian heard this standard for the first time, a thought suddenly arose in his heart, impacting the Supreme True Ancestor.

"Is there any benefit to attacking the Supreme True Ancestor?" Ye Tian asked again.

"This is a big secret, why should I tell you?" asked Ouyang Jiu'er.

"This!" Ye Tian didn't know what to say, but just as he was pondering, Ouyang Jiu'er said again: "Okay, I'll tell you for free, but if I want to ask you for help in the future, you have to help me!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

I saw Ouyang Jiu'er say: "The Supreme True Ancestor is not only powerful in battle, but more importantly, the origin of the Supreme True Ancestor will be completely condensed into the Supreme Dao Source, and the power of the Origin will be generated from time to time. In other words, the Supreme True Ancestor does not lack the Origin, and even if the Origin is exhausted, it can be quickly recovered. But once the origin of the Supreme True Ancestor and the Invincible True Ancestor is exhausted, it is equivalent to being abolished. Therefore, True Ancestors generally did not dare to allow their origin to be traumatized. Once many True Ancestors and even Dao Ancestors were damaged, it would take a long time for them to recover. For example, the fragments of the domain realm shuttled through the dark forbidden domain, and the Dao Ancestor and a large number of True Ancestor Origins were severely damaged, and even almost shattered the Origin in serious cases, so they could not recover from sleeping for countless years. But the Supreme True Ancestor didn't need to worry about this, no injury would be able to seriously hurt them. "

"That's not the point, the point is that the Supreme True Ancestor can completely use the origin to strengthen his strength! For example, there are some forbidden techniques, that is, using the origin to improve his strength, but others don't dare to cultivate at all, cultivation is tantamount to suicide, but the Supreme True Ancestor can cultivate! For example, the Supreme True Ancestor's physical body has reached its limit, but if you cultivate those forbidden techniques, you can break the strength of the physical body again, and you can continue to refine the power of the True Ancestor and improve the power of the True Ancestor!"

"In addition, the origin can also accelerate the cultivation of Dao techniques, and it is not too difficult to cultivate a Thousand Dao Techniques to the extreme level!"

"Therefore, if an invincible true ancestor steps into the supreme true ancestor, the strength will not increase too much, but as time passes, the strength of the supreme true ancestor will become more and more exaggerated, and it is easy to crush an invincible true ancestor. There was once a Supreme True Ancestor who fought with a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor and killed each other as a result, you can imagine how terrifying the strength of the Supreme True Ancestor was!"

"According to the secrets I know, the worst achievement of the Supreme True Ancestor in the future is also the Nine Heavens Invincible True Ancestor, most of them can be promoted to the level of a half-step Domain Ancestor, and a few have stepped into the realm of the Domain Ancestor!"

After listening to Ouyang Jiu'er's story, Ye Tiancai truly realized the terrifying nature of the Supreme True Ancestor.

Of course, he also wanted to enter the ranks of the Supreme True Ancestor even more.

"According to what you said, is it the Supreme True Ancestor, in fact, it depends on whether or not the Supreme Dao Source has been condensed?" Ye Tian asked.

"That's right, that's it!" Ouyang Jiu'er nodded, "It is the condensation of the Supreme Dao Source that is the mark of the Supreme True Ancestor, so the standard of the Supreme True Ancestor will be recognized, as for the other five standards, they are all standards set by the True Ancestors themselves, and they are not recognized." "

At this moment, Ye Tian had a general understanding of the situation.

If it weren't for Ouyang Jiu'er's explanation, he wouldn't know anything at all.

It's just that he didn't cultivate the forbidden technique of the origin, even if he really became the supreme true ancestor in the future, where did he get this forbidden technique?

"Black Wind Mountain should have such a forbidden art inheritance, right?"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, if it does not reach the Supreme True Ancestor realm, even if Black Wind Mountain has a forbidden art inheritance, it is impossible to inform the generals, otherwise if they forcibly cultivate, the whole person will be completely abolished.

In the following days, Ye Tian's goal was very certain, and in addition to cultivation, he usually cultivated his own team, the Nine Extremes Army.

Under the cultivation of a large number of boundary stones, a large number of top geniuses were born, all of whom possessed super-god-level comprehension talents.

At least in Ye Tian's eyes, the super god-level comprehension talent is very good, and it is the most cost-effective to use boundary stones to improve the comprehension talent, if the performance is good, Ye Tian will also improve their talents in other aspects.

There is no shortage of talents, no lack of resources, and with Ye Tian's guidance, these geniuses have been promoted to the True Ancestor realm one by one, and as soon as they break through, they will directly become elite True Ancestors.

Gradually, the number of True Ancestors under Ye Tian's command reached three digits, and he was working towards four digits.

And Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu have also broken through to the realm of True Ancestor, and their current combat power is Elite True Ancestor, which is still a little far away from the top True Ancestor, but one day they will be able to reach that level.

this day.

Ye Tian was comprehending the Dao Codex, and suddenly his heart came, and he had a strange understanding.

A wisp of the breath of the Supreme Sword Dao spread!

At this moment, he realized!

"It's finally done, I didn't expect it to be so difficult to comprehend a trace of the Xeon Dao, fortunately with the assistance of the Dao Codex, otherwise I don't know when I will be able to comprehend a trace of the Xeon Dao. "

Ye Tian muttered.

However, only comprehending a trace of the skin of the Supreme Sword Dao, although there was an increase in Ye Tian's strength, the improvement was not large.

After all, Ye Tian's combat power was already very strong, how much help could a mere wisp of the supreme sword dao be?

But this is the beginning, once he continues to comprehend, it will still greatly improve his combat power.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian comprehended trace after trace of the Supreme Dao, and his progress became greater and greater.

On the other hand, his forbidden body is gradually approaching the realm of Sancheng.

Everything is going for the better!
